login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to get started
login.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

emailLogin.subtitle: Get a login link via email
emailLogin.sendError: Failed to send email. Please try again.
emailLogin.linkSent: We sent you a login link
emailLogin.linkSentTo: We sent a login link to
emailLogin.clickLink: Click the link in the email to complete login.
emailLogin.linkWillBeSent: A login link will be sent to your email.
emailLogin.secureLogin: Sign in securely without a password.

oauthLogin.subtitle: Sign in with your account to get started
oauthLogin.error: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

register.subtitle: Create a new account to get started
register.name: Name
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.disabledDescription: New registrations are not being accepted at this time.
register.pendingApprovalSubtitle: You can use the service after admin approval
register.readySubtitle: You can sign in right now
register.pendingDescription:
Your registration request has been submitted.
You can use the service after an admin
reviews and approves your account.
register.completeDescription:
Registration is complete.
Click the button below to sign in.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a link to sign in to {appName}
verify.clickLink:
Click the login link in the email
to complete sign in.
verify.checkSpam:
If you didn't receive the email,
check your spam folder.

suspended.title: Account Suspended
suspended.subtitle: Your account has been suspended by an administrator
suspended.description: Your account is suspended and you cannot use the service. Please contact the administrator for inquiries.

pending.title: Pending Approval
pending.subtitle: Waiting for admin approval
pending.description: Registration is complete. You can use the service after an admin reviews and approves your account.

layout.title: Admin Console
layout.description: Manage users, approval requests, and global settings.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: View user status and auth policies at a glance and take action.
dashboard.pendingRequestsDesc: Currently {count} registration requests are waiting for review.
dashboard.operationCheckDesc: Periodically check {suspended} suspended and {admins} admin accounts.

approvals.title: Pending Approval List
approvals.description: Review and approve or hold registration requests.
approvals.allProcessed: All registration requests have been processed

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.description: Manage branding, feature flags, connection defaults, and other operation settings.

descriptions.auth_registrationPolicy: open: instant approval, approval: admin approval required
descriptions.ui_welcomeMessage: Description message shown when starting a new chat
descriptions.ui_chatInputPlaceholder: Placeholder text shown in the chat input field
descriptions.features_showHistory: Show previous chat list in sidebar
descriptions.features_enableDeletion: Allow users to delete chat threads
descriptions.features_enableGraphSelection: Allow users to select graphs (Assistants). Uses default graph when disabled
descriptions.features_enableConnectionSelection: Allow users to select LangGraph connections. Uses default connection when disabled
descriptions.features_enableAdvancedInput: Show schema-based optional fields. Shows only basic chat input when disabled
descriptions.features_fileUploadMode: How schema file fields send data: base64 encodes inline, url uploads to server
descriptions.features_defaultGraphId: Default graph ID to use when graph selection is disabled
descriptions.features_defaultConnectionApiUrl: Default API URL to use when connection selection is disabled
descriptions.branding_appTitle: App name shown in browser tab and header
descriptions.branding_logoUrl: Logo image URL shown in header and login page
descriptions.branding_faviconUrl: Icon URL shown in browser tab (uses logo if empty)

table.name: Name
table.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {email}? This action cannot be undone.

imagePreview.placeholder: Enter image URL or upload file...
imagePreview.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, ICO)
imagePreview.fileTooLarge: File size must be 2MB or less.
imagePreview.cannotLoadCheck: Cannot load image. Please check the URL.

error.title: An error occurred
error.authRequired: Authentication required. Please sign in again.
error.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
error.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
error.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
error.requestTimeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
error.processingError: An error occurred while processing the request.

form.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop files or click to upload

chat.serverError: Failed to connect to LangGraph server
chat.serverErrorDescription: Please ensure your graph is running at {apiUrl} and your API key is correctly set (if connecting to a deployed graph).

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoCollapseDesc: Automatically collapse tool call details after response completes
settings.deleteAllDesc: Permanently delete all conversation history. This action cannot be undone.
settings.resetConfirm:
Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?

This will reset:
- UI settings (font, color scheme, etc.)
- Connection settings
- Sidebar states

You will be redirected to the home page.
settings.resetSuccess: Settings have been reset to defaults
settings.deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete all conversation history?

All {count} conversation(s) will be permanently deleted.

This action cannot be undone.
